channel.title: Perpetual Rebalancing on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in Perpetual Rebalancing on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: Why Static SIP Allocation Is Inefficient (And How Cashflow Rebalancing Fixes It)
item.description: Static SIPs blindly invest fixed amounts regardless of portfolio drift. Cashflow-Based Rebalancing uses new investments to continuously correct allocation drift — enabling tax-efficient perpetual rebalancing during the accumulation phase.
